task_completion.description: Create the 'Blood Lead Level Panel' (BLL_PANEL) lab test type with three specific analytes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the GNU Health 'Lab Test Types' form with code 'BLL_PANEL' and name 'Blood Lead Level Panel'. The analytes list must include Blood Lead Level (ref <5), Zinc Protoporphyrin (ref <40), and Free Erythrocyte Protoporphyrin (ref <35).

task_completion.description: Register the new patient Marcus Torres with correct demographics.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Patient registration form for 'Marcus Torres', Male, DOB '1985-06-14', with occupation listed as 'Battery Manufacturing Technician'.

task_completion.description: Enter active conditions and Penicillin allergy for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the patient's Diseases/Conditions tab should show T56.0 (Toxic effects of lead), D64.9 (Anemia), and I10 (Essential hypertension). Penicillin should also be listed with the 'Is Allergy' checkbox ticked, severity 'Severe', and reaction 'Anaphylaxis'.

task_completion.description: Record the patient's family medical history.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Family History tab should show Father with I25.1 (Atherosclerotic heart disease) marked as deceased at age 62, and Mother with E11 (Type 2 diabetes mellitus) marked as alive.

task_completion.description: Create a health evaluation with the specified chief complaint and vitals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Patient Evaluation form should show the chief complaint mentioning chronic fatigue, headaches, and abdominal pain for 3 weeks. The Vitals section must show Systolic BP 145, Diastolic BP 92, Heart Rate/BPM 78, and Temperature 37.0C.
Screenshots of the Lab Orders tab/form should show an order for the newly created 'BLL_PANEL', as well as 'CBC' (Complete Blood Count) and 'CMP' (Comprehensive Metabolic Panel) for Marcus Torres.

task_completion.description: Prescribe Succimer and Ferrous Sulfate, and schedule a follow-up appointment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots of the Prescriptions form should show Succimer (or DMSA) 10mg/kg q8h for 5 days and Ferrous Sulfate 325mg once daily. An Appointment form or evaluation follow-up field should show a scheduled date approximately 14 days in the future.

integrity.description: The agent must use the GNU Health (Tryton Sao) web GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Tryton Sao web interface being actively used (menus, form fields, save buttons) rather than terminal commands or direct database queries.

integrity.description: The agent must not modify the decoy patient (Ana Isabel Betz) who already has a T56.0 diagnosis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should clearly show the patient name as 'Marcus Torres' on all created records, evaluations, and prescriptions, with no evidence of searching for or editing 'Ana Isabel Betz'.

integrity.description: The agent must actually save the records in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show confirmation messages, saved record states (e.g., non-editable text after saving, or records appearing in list views), rather than just filled-out but unsaved forms.

privileged_info_for_vlm: GNU Health 5.0 (Tryton Sao) specifics: 1) Allergies are NOT in a separate table; they are standard disease records with the 'Is Allergy' checkbox ticked. 2) The lab test type 'BLL_PANEL' and patient 'Marcus Torres' do not pre-exist and must be created from scratch. 3) Required ICD-10 codes: T56.0 (Lead toxicity), D64.9 (Anemia), I10 (Hypertension), I25.1 (Atherosclerotic heart disease - Father), E11 (Type 2 diabetes - Mother). 4) Vitals: BP 145/92, HR 78, Temp 37.0. 5) Labs to order: BLL_PANEL, CBC, CMP. 6) Meds: Succimer (DMSA) and Ferrous Sulfate. 7) Follow-up should be scheduled 7-21 days from the current date (target 14 days).
